items.name: 北畠家関係資料（北畠家旧家屋・錦旗・直垂の袖・永禄日記・古舘城址見取図扁額・北畠家に関する古文書）
items.description: 指定文化財第一号。北畠家旧家屋、錦旗、直垂の袖、永禄日記、菅江真澄作と伝わる古舘城址見取図扁額、北畠家に関する古文書の一括。

en.name_en: Materials Related to the Kitabatake Family
en.description_en: A collection of materials related to the Kitabatake family, including the family's former residence, a brocade banner, a hitatare sleeve, the Eiroku diary, a framed sketch map of the Furudate castle site, and old documents, classified within the tangible cultural properties category. It is town-designated by Itayanagi. The designation was made on 1984-10-26.

items.name: 五雲山正休寺山門
items.description: 一棟。寛政年間の建立と推定。切妻造、四脚門。

en.description_en: The main gate (sanmon) of Shōkyū-ji temple (mountain name Goun-zan), a structure within the tangible cultural properties category. It is town-designated by Itayanagi. The designation was made on 1986-03-20.

items.name: 旧役場庁舎正面玄関
items.description: 一棟。棟梁堀江佐吉。明治32年新築の板柳尋常高等小学校正面玄関。現在は郷土資料館に移転保存。

en.name_en: Front Entrance of the Former Town Hall Building
en.description_en: The front entrance of the former town hall building, a structure within the tangible cultural properties category. It is town-designated by Itayanagi. The designation was made on 1986-03-20.

items.name: 表町七福神舞
items.description: 一組。祝い事に招かれ演じる七福神の舞。囃子詞「みさいな」が特徴。

en.description_en: The Seven Lucky Gods dance of Omotemachi, a folk performing art within the folk cultural properties category. It is town-designated by Itayanagi. The designation was made on 1987-05-22.

items.name: 五林平太刀振り
items.description: 一組。虫追いの願いを込めた太刀を振る踊り。

en.description_en: The Gorindaira sword-swinging performance (tachifuri), a folk performing art within the folk cultural properties category. It is town-designated by Itayanagi. The designation was made on 1987-05-22.

items.name: サワラとイチイ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 一対。須郷家（石野）先祖が1600年頃須郷崎より移住時に持参した記念木。

en.description_en: A sawara cypress and a Japanese yew (ichii), designated as a natural monument in the monuments category. It is town-designated by Itayanagi. The designation was made on 1993-02-19.

items.name: 寶量大權現大幟
items.description: 二流。安政六年(1859)御蔵町氏子中が寶量宮に奉納した麻製の大幟。12.35m×1.2m。

en.description_en: A large ceremonial banner (ōnobori) of Hōryō Daigongen, classified within the tangible cultural properties category. It is town-designated by Itayanagi. The designation was made on 2003-02-26.

items.name: アカマツ（深味）
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 板柳町大字深味字深宮4番地
items.description: 杉山屋敷に生育。樹齢約400年、樹高約17.25m、幹周囲約2.77m。

en.description_en: A Japanese red pine (akamatsu) at Fukami, designated as a natural monument in the monuments category. It is town-designated by Itayanagi, located at Fukamiya 4, Fukami, Itayanagi. The designation was made on 2004-07-21.

items.name: サイカチ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 板柳町大字掛落林字宮本111番地
items.description: 樹齢約300年、樹高約8.0m、幹周囲約4.48m。

en.description_en: A Japanese honey locust (saikachi) tree designated as a natural monument in the monuments category. It is town-designated by Itayanagi, located at Miyamoto 111, Kakeochibayashi, Itayanagi. The designation was made on 2004-07-21.

items.name: イチョウ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 板柳町大字小幡字柳田45番地
items.description: 町内随一の巨木。樹齢約350年、樹高約36.0m、幹周囲約5.15m。

en.description_en: A ginkgo tree (ichō) designated as a natural monument in the monuments category. It is town-designated by Itayanagi, located at Yanagita 45, Obata, Itayanagi. The designation was made on 2004-07-21.

items.name: ハルニレ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 板柳町大字石野字宮本1番地
items.description: 全国第三位の巨木。樹齢約500年、樹高約26.5m、幹周囲約6.68m。

en.description_en: A Japanese elm (harunire) tree designated as a natural monument in the monuments category. It is town-designated by Itayanagi, located at Miyamoto 1, Ishino, Itayanagi. The designation was made on 2004-07-21.

items.name: アカマツ（赤田）
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 板柳町大字赤田字松下無番地
items.description: 赤田集落南入口。地上1.5mで二股、股からニワトコが生える。樹齢約300年、樹高約12.5m、幹周囲約3.55m。

en.description_en: A Japanese red pine (akamatsu) at Akada, designated as a natural monument in the monuments category. It is town-designated by Itayanagi, located at Matsushita (no lot number), Akada, Itayanagi. The designation was made on 2004-07-21.

items.name: トチノキ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 板柳町大字夕顔関字長田34番地2
items.description: 十川堤防沿い。樹齢約450年、樹高約20.0m、幹周囲約4.53m。

en.description_en: A Japanese horse chestnut (tochinoki) tree designated as a natural monument in the monuments category. It is town-designated by Itayanagi, located at Nagata 34-2, Yūgaozeki, Itayanagi. The designation was made on 2004-07-21.

items.name: 古文書（板屋野木中屋敷並堤之間数、同寺屋敷宮地書付控之帳他九点）
items.description: 貞享元年の領内総検地に関する資料。絵図面に明治初期の町の状況がうかがえる。

en.name_romaji: Komonjo (Itayanogi Nakayashiki narabi ni Tsutsumi no Manisū, Dō Teraya shiki Miyachi Kakitsuke Hikae no Chō hoka Kyūten)
en.name_en: Old Documents (ten items including a register of the Itayanogi Nakayashiki and embankment measurements)
en.description_en: A set of ten old documents, including a register of the Itayanogi Nakayashiki and embankment measurements together with related temple-land and shrine-land memoranda, classified as old documents within the tangible cultural properties category. It is town-designated by Itayanagi. The designation was made on 2007-07-05.

items.name: 板柳町獅子踊り
items.description: 一組。津軽藩ゆかりの踊り。兄獅子・弟獅子・雌獅子・オカシコの4人1組、十曲。

en.description_en: The deer dance (shishiodori) of Itayanagi, a folk performing art within the folk cultural properties category. It is town-designated by Itayanagi. The designation was made on 2009-02-25.

items.name: 板柳町どだればぢ踊り
items.description: 一組。故葛西喜十郎氏が昭和32年頃創作。板柳町正調盆踊り・流し踊り。

en.description_en: The Dodarebaji dance of Itayanagi, a folk performing art within the folk cultural properties category. It is town-designated by Itayanagi. The designation was made on 2012-06-25.

items.name: 海童神社
items.description: 文禄2年(1593)創建の宝量宮を前身とし、承応元年(1653)現在地に遷宮、明治6年海童神社と改称。拝殿・本殿・中門・神楽殿・御神輿・宝量宮額面・神明宮・淡嶋宮を含む。

en.description_en: Kaidō Shrine, a structure within the tangible cultural properties category. It is town-designated by Itayanagi. The designation was made on 2012-06-25.

items.name: 海童神社神輿渡御
items.description: 一組。元禄15年(1702)豪商若狭屋儀兵衛の神輿奉納を契機に始まる。神主が獅子頭を伴い氏子を訪問し祈祷、夜は神楽舞を奉納。

en.name_en: Portable Shrine Procession of Kaidō Shrine
en.description_en: The portable shrine (mikoshi) procession of Kaidō Shrine, classified under manners and customs within the folk cultural properties category. It is town-designated by Itayanagi. The designation was made on 2015-06-24.
